title: Skyrim mouse сlick sound
description: Changes the click sound to sound from Skyrim
body:
Changes the click sound to sound from Skyrim.

Nothing else.


Whenever I played any big fantasy modpacks, something always ruined my immersion. I couldn't see it, but a strange feeling always followed me. Finally I realized what it was... Click sound. Horrible mechanical sound when entering and leaving the game. However, the tyranny of this has finally come to an end. Experience incredible pleasure with the click sound from the legendary TES 5 Skyrim.
